passiveAbilities.name: Bingy
passiveAbilities.description: When making a Reaction Step whilst engaged by an enemy, this model may spend (0) energy instead of (1).

activeAbilities.name: Boingy
activeAbilities.description: Place this model within 2" and LoS. This model cannot take Harvest actions until end of turn.

activeAbilities.name: Astrazan Tactics
activeAbilities.description: This character immediately takes a Melee Attack or Blunderbuss action against an enemy in range, without spending energy. In either case, increase any Dmg dealt by +2, then place this model within 1" of itself and LoS after resolving the attack.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Blunderbuss]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Blunderbuss
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Leaped & Loaded
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Place this model within 1" of itself and LoS. You may immediately play the Reload ability even if engaged, and without spending energy.
